revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 20:16:01 on [[Template:Coord missing]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>[[category:All articles missing geocoordinate data]]</includeonly><noinclude> This template is used to mark articles not having geolocation data such as {{tl|coord}}.
== Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing}}
=== Parameters === ::(not yet implemented)
== Obtaining coordinates == Coordinates may be determined from a variety of sources, depending on the location. * [http://geonames.usgs.gov/ The USGS Board on geographic names] GNIS is the authoritative source in the United States; the database contains many foreign points. </noinclude>

revision.text: Coordinates missing! [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|You can help.]][[category:All articles missing geocoordinate data]] This template is used to mark articles not having geolocation data such as {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing}} === Parameters === ::(not yet implemented) == Obtaining coordinates == Coordinates may be determined from a variety of sources, depending on the location. * [http://geonames.usgs.gov/ The USGS Board on geographic names] GNIS is the authoritative source in the United States; the database contains many foreign points.

Coordinates missing! [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|You can help.]][[category:All articles missing geocoordinate data]] This template is used to mark articles not having geolocation data such as {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing}} === Parameters === ::(not yet implemented) == Obtaining coordinates == Coordinates may be determined from a variety of sources, depending on the location. * [http://geonames.usgs.gov/ The USGS Board on geographic names] GNIS is the authoritative source in the United States; the database contains many foreign points. ==Adding coordinates== * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {[tl|coord}}. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. * See also [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]].

Coordinates missing! [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|You can help.]][[category:All articles missing geocoordinate data]] This template is used to mark articles not having geolocation data such as {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing}} === Parameters === ::(not yet implemented) == Obtaining coordinates == Coordinates may be determined from a variety of sources, depending on the location. * [http://geonames.usgs.gov/ The USGS Board on geographic names] GNIS is the authoritative source in the United States; the database contains many foreign points. ==Adding coordinates== * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {[tl|coord}}. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. * See also [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]].

Coordinates missing! [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|You can help.]][[category:All articles missing geocoordinate data]] This template is used to mark articles not having geolocation data such as {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing}} === Parameters === ::(not yet implemented) == Obtaining coordinates == Coordinates may be determined from a variety of sources, depending on the location. * [http://geonames.usgs.gov/ The USGS Board on geographic names] GNIS is the authoritative source in the United States; the database contains many foreign points. ==Adding coordinates== * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. * See also [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]].
